seo.title: Big Three Games | Heritage and Future Worlds
seo.description: Big Three Games is an independent studio creating strategic worlds with expressive characters. Explore Heritage and get in touch with the team.

hero.title: A Tale of Three Friends
hero.summary: Big Three Games creates strategic and challenging worlds. Our first title, Heritage, blends roguelike decision-making with auto-battler combat and RPG elements.

games.title: The Start of our Legacy: Heritage
games.lede: Based on our favorites manwhas and roguelikes, Heritage was born to build our Legacy
games.keyArtAlt: Vertical key art featuring Oro from Heritage
games.intro: Animount has been seized by Drammul, the Lizard King, and his army. The only one capable of stopping them is Oro, the serpent. Trapped in a cycle of reincarnation, choose Scrolls, skills and equipments, and join powerful Sects in this Auto-Battler Roguelike to defeat Drammul and save Animount.

studioSection.title: Who We Are
studioSection.lede: We are a small independent team building games that challenge players to think strategically in order to win. From loving games to making them, our journey is driven by a passion for creating.

values.title: Player-Driven Iteration
values.body: We value player feedback and use it to guide our development process. We love to engage with your ideas, and explore them directly into the game.

values.title: Systemic Depth
values.body: We build mechanics from scratch. Our motto is 'Make it as simple, but not simpler'. We want systems that are easy to learn but hard to master.

values.title: Memorable Worlds
values.body: We want each world to have personality, visual identity, and stakes that players can feel. You should be able to appreciate any game fully, the way you want.

contactCta.title: Want to cover Heritage or contact the team?
contactCta.body: We are a game development studio focused on our own titles. Reach out for press, creator coverage, and community messages.
